text: carbs is 0.5g. but the real story is the context, not the nutrition profile.

on the plus side. much better than the sugary version because the replacement logic matters in misc. clear real-world role because if a misc item helps or harms behavior, that matters a lot. context tells the real story because that is the whole point of misc.

now the downsides. still encourages heavy stimulant habits because a better option is not automatically a great option. easy to overrate or misuse because this category attracts strong marketing and habits. better replacements often exist because that practical comparison matters.
Zero-Sugar Energy Drink is D tier. Best treated as an occasional context item, not a nutritional base.
